spike_metadata.source: Composite from docs/sp-decisions-backtest.md, docs/nola-lopez-holmes-triview-2026-04-23.md, docs/sp-framework-v4-balanced.md §「2026-04-24 全 18 SP 實戰驗證」
spike_metadata.ground_truth_p1: Aaron Nola (per fa_scan #98 mechanical recommendation, but downgraded to hold 04-23 after triview revealed v3 blind spots)
spike_metadata.ground_truth_dispute: Triview agents (進階/印象 2/3) chose Nola; (傳統 1/3) chose López. v4 04-24 framework reading placed Nola Sum 19 (mid-low) and López Sum 7 (extreme bottom). The 'true' P1 by structural quality is debatable — this is precisely why it tests multi-agent diversity.
spike_metadata.intent: Test whether 3 independent claude -p agents agree on P1 given identical v4 material. Disagreement is informative (matches triview history); agreement could also be informative (mechanical clarity).

framework_version: v4 (5-slot Sum: IP/GS + Whiff% + BB/9 + GB% + xwOBACON)
scoring_categories: 7×7 H2H one-win: pitchers track IP, W, K, ERA, WHIP, QS, SV+H

candidates.name: Aaron Nola

data_2025_prior.season_context: Disaster year: ankle + rib stress fracture, 2 IL stints

urgency_factors.factor_3_21d_delta_xwobacon: raw value not measured at 04-22 (savant_rolling did not yet capture xwobacon)

tags: ⚠️ 速度物理訊號 — FB velo avg 91.2 mph matches 2025 disaster year baseline (91.0 mph), no spring rebound
⚠️ xwOBACON .424 <P25 — on-contact damage worst among 4 candidates
context_notes: %owned 79% (high acquisition cost, drop is irreversible without expensive re-add)
PHI strong team — W upside if hands clean innings

candidates.name: Reynaldo López

data_2025_prior.season_context: 2025-04 shoulder arthroscopic surgery, season-ending after 1 start. Prior season (2024) was elite — but 2025 sample too small (5 IP) to compute meaningful Sum.

urgency_factors.factor_2_2025_prior_sum: no prior baseline (5 IP only) — breakout-待驗 not slump hold
urgency_factors.factor_4_luck_regression: xera-era = -1.11 (撿便宜 luck signal — xERA 3.74 says he's better than ERA 4.85 suggests; but xwOBACON .466 is structural disaster)

tags: ⚠️ Whiff% 10.2 — bottom of league, K suppression collapsed
⚠️ BB/9 4.57 + 0 QS — week ceiling structurally low
✅ 撿便宜運氣 — xera-era -1.11 P70+ (but contradicted by ⚠️ structural)
ℹ️ Post-shoulder-surgery year-1, mechanics may still be rebuilding
context_notes: ATL strong team — W tailwind if outings hold together
%owned moderate, drop reversible if rebound proves real

candidates.name: Grant Holmes

data_2025_prior.season_context: Mid-season UCL partial tear ended 2025 in July. Healthy entering 2026.

tags: ℹ️ Post-UCL tear, monitoring durability over season
context_notes: Stage F call: probably P4 (least drop urgency) given all-green signals

candidates.name: Joey Cantillo

data_2025_prior.season_context: Rookie-year with IL stints. <50 IP — not slump-hold eligible.

urgency_factors.factor_4_luck_regression: xera-era = -0.40 (neutral, BBE 35 below 40 gate → suppress luck tag)

tags: ⚠️ 樣本小 — BBE 35 below 40 confidence threshold
⚠️ Boundary swingman — 4/5 outings as SP, 1 as RP, role not fully locked
⚠️ IP/GS 4.50 — short outings limit weekly QS/IP ceiling
ℹ️ K/9 9.50 strong, breakout candidate but small sample
context_notes: CLE may use as long relief flexibility — week ceiling unclear
Drop reversible if role clarifies in either direction
